title: Nvidia Invests $2 Billion in Marvell
summary: Nvidia said it has invested $2 billion in chip maker Marvell as part of a “strategic partnership” in which Marvell will supply chips that work with Nvidia technology. title: Oracle Lays of Thousands of Employees
summary: Oracle is laying off thousands of employees, CNBC reported.
